summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration testing of YANKABA single-page marketing site. All 12 requested test areas validated successfully. No console errors, no failures.
critical_code_review_comments: Universities.jsx wraps entire card in <a> with target=_blank — works correctly but the inner 'Visit website' label has no separate anchor (acceptable, parent card is the link).
ApplyForm.jsx uses native <select> instead of shadcn Select — fine for current scope and easier to test with select_option.
Backend /api/ only exposes the default Hello World endpoint — confirmed working; nothing else is needed by this site.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Single-page React site at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/. ApplyForm submits by opening wa.me/mailto URLs (no API). To verify whatsapp URL, override window.open before clicking form-submit-whatsapp. For mailto verification, intercepting window.location.href via Object.defineProperty is unreliable across browsers — instead listen for popup events or use page.expect_popup. All data-testids documented in review request are present and functional.

detailed_results.hero_title: Begin your journey to one of the best Egyptian universities.
detailed_results.empty_form_submit_toast: Please fill in all required fields — Missing: Name
detailed_results.mobile_menu_toggle: opens and closes correctly at viewport 390x844
